reviews.review_description: It’s spent two hours building a house saved it. I joined the code to show my friend. He was bugging out really hard and then I was bugging out so I couldn’t show him and my house didn’t save. ￼
Minecraft is hard to find and recquiers a pc. Thx good nes for this game. But plz have it so that you can continue a world with others
Your idea of mixing Gorilla tag and Minecraft is so cool this is just free Minecraft at this point! So cool and epic love this game!
Very good game although I have one warning for you… I will not repeat myself so you better listen. DO NOT UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES TURN ON HIGH GRAPHICS MODE! JUST DON’T. TRUST ME. DON’T DO IT.
